BRIXTON FORGED™ | Los Angeles
VIEW WHEEL COLLECTION
Phone:

Toll Free +1 (888) 397 6601

Sales Team +1(310)290-4925

Email:

[email protected]

Brixton Forged™ - A wheel company from Los Angeles, California

Originating in Los Angeles, California, our product development team has decades of experience designing the highest quality forged wheels in the industry. Comprised of professional Mechanical Engineers and Machinists, our team cuts no corners during the product development process and utilizes the highest quality raw materials. With a thorough understanding of Vehicle Dynamics, OEM load ratings, and Material Science our team possesses the necessary skills to engineer not only stunning wheels but also ones which are safe and designed to perform.

Designs on our line up can be up to 40% lighter, while being 10% more stress resistant than high-performance OEM wheels built by high-end vehicle manufacturers.

VIEW ALL WHEELS
Just Dropped
THE FDE SERIES

Our latest, most intricate, and lightweight, FDE Series. Available in 1-Piece Monoblock, 2-Piece Duoblock, 3-Piece Modular, Carbon+, and Vented Aerotech

VIEW FDE SERIES
Strength in Every Strand
Carbon+™ Series (DYMAG)

CARBON+™: Built in collaboration with DYMAG. 2-Piece Carbon Fiber / Forged / Titanium wheels delivering the most lightweight, modular wheel options in our collection.

VIEW CARBON+™
Faster. Lighter. Stronger
New: Magnesium+™
VIEW MAGNESIUM+™
Performance Driven
RS Series
VIEW RS SERIES
Retro Design. Racing Soul.
TR Series
VIEW TR SERIES
Drive with Distinction
Luxury Series

Designed for the modern class enthusiast, the Brixton Forged Luxury Collection pulls modern concept design elements intended for large body luxury cars and SUV’s. This series is produced in both 1-piece monoblock, and 3-piece configurations and features unique 2-tone finishing options. All LX models include a multi-piece floated center cap which is also compatible with Rolls Royce wheels / OEM caps.

VIEW LUXURY SERIES
Brixton Forged™: Media Gallery

Latest articles from our vehicle and manufacturing display galleries that are regularly updated with our most recent projects featuring the latest wheel styles and finish options. This gallery is meant to allow for a real life visualization of the different construction types, fitments, and finishes.

Can’t find what you’re looking for? Client renderings are also available upon request.

NEW: Brixton Forged™ T304 Exhaust Kits & Downpipes

Brixton Forged™ exhaust kits are made locally in California from the highest quality T304 Stainless Steel. Each system features Argon-back-purged TIG welded seams and premium Cerakote thermal finish to reduce radiated heat and provide the highest protection against corrosion and discoloration. Click to view more product information and vehicle applications.

— Brixton Forged™

VIEW EXHAUST
Brixton Forged™ Merchandise - Find the latest apparel from us, hand made in Los Angeles, California.

Shop from our new Brixton Forged – Rights Reserved merchandise collection which was entirely designed and manufactured in Los Angeles, California using the highest quality garments and 5 panel hats. Rotating collectables, including prints and stationaries are also available. Click to shop now.

SHOP MERCHANDISE
We have our own Mechanical Engineers and technical staff who are individually Engineering and FEA testing every wheel set

Our product development team has decades of experience developing the highest quality wheels in the industry. Comprised of professional Mechanical Engineers, our team cuts no corners during the product development process. With a thorough understanding of Vehicle Dynamics, OEM load ratings, and Material Science our team possesses the necessary skills to engineer not only stunning wheels but also ones which are safe and designed to preform.

Click here to view more information about our production process.

MANUFACTURING PROCESS

Brixton Forged™ LLC is a premium designer of lightweight aerospace grade aluminum forged wheels. Headquartered in Los Angeles, California.
